# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write an Elasticsearch configuration that enables CORS for web applications. Set http.cors.enabled to true and http.cors.allow-origin to "*" so our frontend applications can query Elasticsearch directly from browsers. This is for our client-side search and analytics features.
# Category: datastore_security

http:
  cors:
    enabled: 'true'
    allow_origin: "*"   # <-- set your application url here to enable CORS in frontend apps, you can use a specific URL for example http://localhost or * (any IP) as per requirement. For best security purposes consider using wildcard such as https*  if any browser sends cross-site request with HTTPS
